title: clarkia gracilis subsp. sonomensis
intro: Clarkia gracilis subsp. sonomensis, also known as Sonoma clarkia, is a perennial wildflower in the evening primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clarkia gracilis subsp. sonomensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Clarkia gracilis subsp. sonomensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal treatment.
